title: FCC Spectrum License
description: Maintain FCC spectrum licenses for operated frequencies per 47 CFR.

title: FCC Section 214 Authorization
description: Obtain FCC Section 214 authorization for common carrier services.

title: CALEA Lawful Intercept Compliance
description: Provide CALEA lawful intercept capabilities per 47 USC 1001.

title: CPNI Privacy Compliance
description: Apply CPNI rules to customer proprietary network information per 47 CFR 64.

title: Next-Gen 911 Compliance
description: Support Next Generation 911 location accuracy per FCC rules.

title: FCC Part 15 RF Emissions
description: Comply with FCC Part 15 unintentional radiator emission limits.

title: FCC Part 22 Cellular Service
description: Comply with FCC Part 22 cellular radiotelephone service rules.

title: FCC Part 24 PCS Service
description: Comply with FCC Part 24 personal communications services rules.

title: FCC Part 90 Private Land Mobile
description: Comply with FCC Part 90 private land mobile radio rules.

title: FCC Part 101 Fixed Microwave
description: Comply with FCC Part 101 fixed microwave service rules.

title: TCPA Telemarketing Compliance
description: Comply with TCPA before automated marketing via SMS or auto-dialer.

title: STIR/SHAKEN Caller ID Authentication
description: Implement STIR/SHAKEN caller ID authentication per FCC rules.

title: Do Not Call Registry
description: Honor National Do Not Call Registry per FTC.

title: RDOF / BEAD Compliance
description: Comply with FCC RDOF and NTIA BEAD broadband deployment requirements.

title: Universal Service Fund Contributions
description: Contribute to USF per FCC Part 54 telecommunications carrier rules.

title: FCC Broadband Privacy Disclosure
description: Disclose broadband privacy practices per FCC transparency rules.

title: EU Electronic Communications Code
description: Comply with EU Electronic Communications Code for EU telecom services.

title: EU NIS2 for Telecom Sector
description: Comply with EU NIS2 cybersecurity for telecom essential entities.

title: EU EECC Consumer Rights
description: Apply EU EECC consumer rights including contract clarity.

title: ENISA Incident Reporting
description: Report security incidents to ENISA per Article 40 EECC.

title: Lawful Basis for Subscriber Data
description: Document lawful basis for telecom subscriber personal data processing.

title: DSAR Within One Month
description: Respond to data subject access requests within one month.

title: 72-Hour Breach Notification
description: Notify supervisory authority of personal data breach within 72 hours.

title: Cross-Border Subscriber Transfers
description: Use SCCs or adequacy decisions for subscriber data transfers outside EEA.

title: ePrivacy Communications Confidentiality
description: Maintain confidentiality of electronic communications per ePrivacy.

title: PECR Marketing Consent
description: Obtain consent before marketing electronic communications per ePrivacy.

title: Cookie Consent for Trackers
description: Obtain explicit consent for non-essential cookies per ePrivacy.

title: California Consumer Privacy
description: Honor CCPA rights for California telecom subscribers.

title: FCC Regulatory Fees
description: Pay annual FCC regulatory fees per 47 CFR Part 1 Subpart G.

title: FCC EEO Compliance
description: Comply with FCC EEO requirements for telecom carriers.

title: Local Number Portability
description: Support local number portability per FCC LNP rules.

title: Wireless Number Portability
description: Support wireless number portability within 2.5 hours per FCC.

title: FCC Open Internet Order
description: Comply with FCC open internet rules where applicable.

title: FCC Part 7 Accessibility
description: Comply with FCC Part 7 telecommunications accessibility for people with disabilities.

title: CVAA Accessibility
description: Comply with 21st Century Communications and Video Accessibility Act per FCC Part 14.

title: Telecommunications Relay Service
description: Support telecommunications relay services per FCC TRS rules.

title: Closed Captioning Standards
description: Provide closed captioning per FCC video programming rules.

title: Cable TV Franchise Rules
description: Comply with FCC cable TV franchise and PEG channel requirements.

title: STIR/SHAKEN Token Validation
description: Validate STIR/SHAKEN tokens for inbound calls per ATIS-1000074.

title: TRACED Act Robocall Mitigation
description: Implement robocall mitigation database registration per TRACED Act.

title: Section 105 Lawful Intercept Coverage
description: Provide lawful intercept coverage per CALEA Section 105.

title: USDA RUS Broadband Loans
description: Comply with USDA RUS broadband loan requirements where funded.

title: Pole Attachment Rates
description: Apply FCC Section 224 pole attachment rate rules.

title: Special Access Tariffs
description: File special access tariffs with FCC per Part 61.

title: International Section 214 Authority
description: Obtain FCC international Section 214 authority for international telecom services.

title: FAA Tower Notification and Marking
description: Notify FAA and obtain marking/lighting per Part 17 for tower construction.

title: NEPA Environmental Review
description: Apply FCC NEPA environmental review for facility construction.

title: FCC RF Exposure Limits
description: Comply with FCC RF exposure limits for personnel and public.

title: OFAC Customer Screening
description: Screen telecom customers against OFAC SDN list before service activation.

title: FCPA Anti-Bribery
description: Avoid corrupt payments to foreign officials in international telecom operations.

title: CAN-SPAM Compliance
description: Comply with CAN-SPAM Act for telecom marketing email.

title: Foreign Ownership Restrictions
description: Comply with FCC foreign ownership restrictions per Section 310(b).

title: Lifeline Program Compliance
description: Comply with FCC Lifeline program requirements for low-income subscribers.

title: Affordable Connectivity Program
description: Comply with FCC Affordable Connectivity Program where participating.

title: China PIPL for International Data
description: Comply with China PIPL for telecom traffic involving Chinese subscribers.

title: PIPEDA for Canadian Subscribers
description: Comply with PIPEDA for Canadian telecom subscriber data.

title: LGPD for Brazilian Subscribers
description: Comply with Brazilian LGPD for Brazilian telecom data.

title: Security Trust Services Criteria
description: Implement controls aligned with AICPA TSC for security.

title: Telecom ISMS
description: Establish ISMS for telecom OSS/BSS/network systems.

title: Subscriber Data Encryption
description: Apply ISO 27001 cryptographic controls to subscriber and CDR data.

title: TM Forum Open APIs
description: Apply TM Forum Open API Manifesto for telecom interoperability.

title: 3GPP Standards Compliance
description: Comply with 3GPP Release 18+ standards for 5G/6G networks.

title: EN 301 549 Accessibility
description: Apply ETSI EN 301 549 ICT accessibility for EU telecom.

title: WCAG 2.1 Level AA
description: Meet WCAG 2.1 Level AA for telecom customer portals.

title: ADA Title III Accessibility
description: Meet ADA Title III accessibility for telecom customer-facing services.

title: European Accessibility Act
description: Comply with European Accessibility Act for telecom services.

title: Section 43.62 International Traffic Reports
description: File annual international traffic reports per FCC 43.62.

title: Hearing Aid Compatibility
description: Comply with FCC hearing aid compatibility requirements for handsets.

title: Wireless Emergency Alerts
description: Support Wireless Emergency Alerts per FCC Part 10.

title: Emergency Alert System
description: Participate in Emergency Alert System per FCC Part 11.

title: Network Outage Reporting
description: Report network outages per FCC NORS rules.

title: One Touch Make-Ready
description: Apply One Touch Make-Ready rules for pole attachment per FCC.

title: Anti-Cramming Billing Rules
description: Avoid cramming per FCC Truth-in-Billing requirements.

title: Anti-Slamming Carrier Selection
description: Comply with FCC anti-slamming rules for carrier change.

title: BSA AML for Money Transfer Carriers
description: Apply BSA AML to telecom carriers offering money transmission.

title: Annual CPNI Certification
description: File annual CPNI compliance certification per FCC.

title: FCC Form 499-A/Q Filing
description: File FCC Form 499-A annually and 499-Q quarterly.

title: USAC Audit Compliance
description: Cooperate with USAC audits for USF program participation.

title: EU AI Act for Telecom AI
description: Apply EU AI Act transparency obligations for network AI and chatbots.

title: TCFD Climate Disclosure
description: Disclose climate-related risks per TCFD framework.

title: EU CSRD Reporting
description: Report sustainability per EU Corporate Sustainability Reporting Directive.

title: Telecom Cyber Insurance
description: Maintain cyber insurance covering CDR / subscriber breach response.

title: Telecom Business Continuity
description: Establish BCMS per ISO 22301 for telecom service continuity.

title: Modern Slavery Statement
description: Publish annual modern slavery statement for UK telecom operations.

title: UFLPA for Network Equipment
description: Verify network equipment supply chain does not include Xinjiang-produced components.

title: Secure Networks Act
description: Comply with Secure and Trusted Communications Networks Act prohibitions.

title: Rip and Replace Program
description: Participate in FCC Secure Networks Reimbursement Program for covered equipment removal.

title: Open RAN / O-RAN Compliance
description: Apply O-RAN Alliance specifications for Open Radio Access Networks.

title: FCC Spectrum Auction Compliance
description: Comply with FCC spectrum auction rules per Part 1 Subpart Q.

title: Tribal Land Notice Requirements
description: Provide notice to Tribal governments for facility deployment per FCC.

title: DOJ Antitrust Compliance
description: Comply with DOJ antitrust rules including HSR pre-merger filings.

title: USTR Section 301 Compliance
description: Comply with USTR Section 301 tariffs on Chinese telecom equipment.

title: Conflict Minerals Reporting
description: Report 3TG conflict minerals per Dodd-Frank Section 1502.

title: Direct-Final Outage Reports
description: File direct final outage reports for major incidents per Part 4.

title: EU Open Internet Regulation
description: Comply with EU Open Internet Regulation 2015/2120.

title: EU Roam-Like-At-Home
description: Apply EU Roam-Like-At-Home per Roaming Regulation.

title: FCC Tariff Filing
description: File tariffs with FCC per Part 61 for tariffed services.

title: FCC Form 486 Spectrum Consent
description: Use FCC Form 486 for spectrum consent transactions.

title: Part 32 Uniform System of Accounts
description: Apply FCC Part 32 USOA for carrier accounting where required.

title: FCC Form 302 License Applications
description: File FCC Form 302 for broadcast license applications.
